name: Venture Global LNG
content: Venture Global LNG is a long-term, low-cost provider of American liquefied natural gas. The company utilizes a highly efficient modular construction process to develop its export facilities, including Calcasieu Pass and Plaquemines LNG. Venture Global is a major disruptor in the LNG market, focusing on meeting the growing global demand for secure and affordable energy through massive capacity expansion and innovative financing.
